---
title: "The Daisy, or, Cautionary Stories in Verse adapted to the Ideas of Children from Four to Eight Years Old"
---

## The Daisy, or, Cautionary Stories in Verse adapted to the Ideas of Children from Four to Eight Years Old

**Author:** Elizabeth Turner
**Date:** 1807
**Imprint:** London: Harris

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
